# CodeGrind Engagement Review Packet

## Campaign

- Title: CodeGrind AI Assistant Enhancements Bring Smarter Problem Solving
- Summary: Highlight the latest AI assistant improvements in CodeGrind, including model-switching and a more persistent chat experience to help users solve problems faster.
- Slug: codegrind-new-ai-assistant-improvements
- Content kind: image
- Target URL: https://codegrind.online

## Media plan

- Media source: generated
- Asset label: generated-codegrind-new-ai-assistant-improvements

- Asset MIME: image/png

## Brief

- Core message: CodeGrind's AI assistant now supports multiple model options, persistent conversations, and improved guidance to streamline problem solving within the interactive DSA practice platform.
- CTA: Explore the updated AI assistant in CodeGrind and try solving a problem with model switching for tailored guidance.
- Visual brief: Static UI-focused image showing the CodeGrind problem editor side-by-side with an AI chat panel, highlighting model-switching dropdown and persistent chat UI, cyberpunk-inspired accent colors, clean typography, and subtle code snippets in the background.

## Review notes

- Do not merge until the copy and selected media are acceptable for public posting.
- If the media choice is wrong, update the review PR branch or rerun the workflow with a different media manifest.
- Merging this PR only auto-posts engagement content if the Pages repo has the matching engagement-dispatch workflow installed.
